description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines DEBIAN_IMAGE and FEDORA_IMAGE variables pointing to registry images, and REBUILD_CI_IMAGES and RUN_ALL_BUILDS flag variables. Add a .pre stage job named build-container-images that uses the debian:testing image, runs before_script "apt-get update" and "apt-get install -y buildah ca-certificates", and triggers only when a tag is present or REBUILD_CI_IMAGES matches 1/yes/true. Its script executes: "cd .gitlab-ci", "buildah build --net host --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/debian:sid --file Dockerfile.debian .", "buildah build --net host --tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/fedora:rawhide --file Dockerfile.fedora .", "buildah login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY", "buildah push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/debian:sid", "buildah push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/fedora:rawhide", "buildah logout $CI_REGISTRY". Then add a build stage with six jobs: debian-clang (image $DEBIAN_IMAGE, rule on tag or RUN_ALL_BUILDS, sets variable CC=clang, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh"), debian-gcc (image $DEBIAN_IMAGE, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh" unconditionally), debian-gcc-no-feat-hotkeys (image $DEBIAN_IMAGE, rule on tag or RUN_ALL_BUILDS, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh -Dfeat-hotkeys=false"), debian-gcc-no-ui (image $DEBIAN_IMAGE, rule on tag or RUN_ALL_BUILDS, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh -Dui-enabled=false"), fedora-clang (image $FEDORA_IMAGE, rule on tag or RUN_ALL_BUILDS, sets CC=clang, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh"), and fedora-gcc (image $FEDORA_IMAGE, rule on tag or RUN_ALL_BUILDS, runs ".gitlab-ci/build.sh"). No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
